info.title: TVmaze API
info.description: The TVmaze public API: shows, episodes, seasons, people, credits, schedules, and alternate episode orderings. Full vendor surface. Embed-capable operations accept named embed[] relation vocabularies; sibling sub-collection routes return the same content as their embed[] equivalents, with the embed form preferred for multi-relation fetches. No authentication required; the authenticated premium user API is a separate surface outside this document's scope.

catalog.name: TVmaze
catalog.description: Public TV and streaming metadata service for discovery, schedules, episode tracking, cast/crew data, and update feeds.

200.description: Array of scored show results

show.name: Girls
show.summary: This Emmy winning series is a comic look at the assorted humiliations and rare triumphs of a group of girls in their 20s.

200.description: Best matching show

404.description: No show found. Body is the JSON literal null, not the Error envelope.

parameters.name: thetvdb
parameters.description: Takes precedence over imdb when both supplied.

301.description: Matched -- the wire contract is a redirect, not a body.

404.description: No show found for given external ID. Body is the JSON literal null.

200.description: Array of scored person results
Array of scheduled episodes with a flat embedded show (ScheduleEntry).

example.name: Episode 105
example.summary: Trump Spends Hours Posting Memes on Social Media

show.name: Way Too Early
show.summary: The fast-paced program brings viewers everything they need to know to start their days--from news and politics to sports and pop culture.

200.description: Array of scheduled web episodes. Each is a plain Episode whose show is always present under _embedded.show -- a different envelope than /schedule's flat ScheduleEntry.

422.description: Invalid web-channel locality value or date.

get.summary: Full schedule -- all future episodes known to TVmaze

200.description: Array of all known future scheduled episodes. Show is intrinsic _embedded.show, always populated (same shape as /schedule/web).
Array of shows for the requested page
Show object.

get.summary: List all episodes for a show

200.description: Array of episodes. Without specials, Returns the same content as /shows/{id}?embed[]=episodes; prefer the embed form when fetching multiple relations in one request. With specials=1 the list additionally includes special episodes -- the one capability the embed form does not serve.
Array of seasons. Returns the same content as /shows/{id}?embed[]=seasons; prefer the embed form when fetching multiple relations in one request.
Array of cast entries. Returns the same content as /shows/{id}?embed[]=cast; prefer the embed form when fetching multiple relations in one request.
Array of crew entries. Returns the same content as /shows/{id}?embed[]=crew; prefer the embed form when fetching multiple relations in one request.

get.summary: Get alternate names (AKAs) for a show

200.description: Array of AKA entries. Returns the same content as /shows/{id}?embed[]=akas; prefer the embed form when fetching multiple relations in one request.
Array of image objects. Returns the same content as /shows/{id}?embed[]=images; prefer the embed form when fetching multiple relations in one request.

get.summary: Get alternate episode lists (EpisodeGroups) for a show

200.description: Array of alternate lists. Returns the same content as /shows/{id}?embed[]=alternatelists; prefer the embed form when fetching multiple relations in one request.

get.summary: Get single episode by season and number

200.description: Episode object.

get.summary: Get episodes that aired on a specific date

200.description: Array of episodes.
Season object.
Array of episodes, specials always included. Returns the same content as /seasons/{id}?embed[]=episodes.
TV Episode object.

get.summary: Get guest cast for an episode

200.description: Array of guest cast entries. Returns the same content as /episodes/{id}?embed[]=guestcast. This route itself ignores any embed parameter.

get.summary: Get guest crew for an episode

200.description: Array of guest crew entries. Returns the same content as /episodes/{id}?embed[]=guestcrew. This route itself ignores any embed parameter.
Array of person objects for the requested page.

400.description: Invalid page value for the people index.

200.description: Person object.

get.summary: Get cast credits for a person

200.description: Array of cast credit entries. Returns the same content as /people/{id}?embed[]=castcredits.

get.summary: Get crew credits for a person

200.description: Array of crew credit entries. Returns the same content as /people/{id}?embed[]=crewcredits.

get.summary: Get guest cast credits for a person

200.description: Array of guest cast credit entries, each linking to episode and character. Returns the same content as /people/{id}?embed[]=guestcastcredits.

get.summary: Get a specific alternate episode list (EpisodeGroup)

200.description: Alternate list object.

get.summary: Get alternate episodes within an alternate list (EpisodeGroup)

200.description: Array of alternate episode entries. Returns the same content as /alternatelists/{id}?embed[]=alternateepisodes.

Character object. The only route to a character's image when traversing from a person: person-anchored credits carry character as a name+href link without an image; only show-anchored CastMember embeds the full object. Not documented by the vendor.
Map of show ID (string) to Unix timestamp of last update.
Map of person ID (string) to Unix timestamp of last update.

NotFound.description: Resource not found. Error envelope with an empty message.

NoMorePagesShows.description: Requested page is past the end of the shows index; the body is an empty array.

NoMorePagesPeople.description: Requested page is past the end of the people index; the body is an empty array.

RateLimited.description: Rate limited. Enforced per IP address; honor the Retry-After header.

page.name: page
page.description: Zero-based page number for paginated index endpoints. Pages are ID-ranged, not row-counted: a page covers an ID interval and may contain fewer items than the interval width.

date.name: date
date.description: ISO 8601 date string (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.

countryCode.name: country
countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Defaults to US.

webScheduleCountry.name: country
webScheduleCountry.description: Web-channel locality filter, tri-state: omit for local+global; ISO code for that country's local channels only; empty string for global channels only.

since.name: since
since.description: Rolling window filter measured back from request time -- not calendar-aligned (month means roughly the last 30 days, not since the 1st). CAUTION: invalid values are silently ignored and return the unfiltered result rather than an error.

specialsShow.name: specials
specialsShow.description: Include special episodes in the list. Omitting the parameter and specials=0 are equivalent. This is the one capability of this endpoint that ?embed[]=episodes does not serve.

embedShow.name: embed[]
embedShow.description: Embed related resources inline. Repeatable array parameter: embed[]=a&embed[]=b.

embedEpisode.name: embed[]
embedEpisode.description: Embed episode-related resources inline. Repeatable array parameter.

embedSeason.name: embed[]
embedSeason.description: Embed season-related resources inline. Repeatable array parameter.

embedPerson.name: embed[]
embedPerson.description: Embed person-related resources inline. Repeatable array parameter.

embedAlternateList.name: embed[]
embedAlternateList.description: Embed alternate-list-related resources inline. Repeatable array parameter.

embedCastCredit.name: embed[]
embedCastCredit.description: Embed related resources inline. Repeatable array parameter. CAUTION: on a person with zero cast credits, embed validation is skipped -- any value returns 200 []; a 200 does not prove the embed value was valid.

embedCrewCredit.name: embed[]
embedCrewCredit.description: Embed crew-credit-related resources inline. Repeatable array parameter. CAUTION: on an empty result, embed validation is skipped -- any value returns 200 [].

embedGuestCastCredit.name: embed[]
embedGuestCastCredit.description: Embed guest-cast-credit-related resources inline. Repeatable array parameter. CAUTION: on an empty result, embed validation is skipped -- any value returns 200 [].

embedAlternateEpisode.name: embed[]
embedAlternateEpisode.description: Embed alternate-episode-related resources inline. Repeatable array parameter.

ShowImage.description: An image asset associated with a show

type.description: Image classification; null on rare records

ImageResolution.description: A single resolution variant of a show image

ImageResolutions.description: Resolution variants of a show image; medium may be absent/null

Rating.description: Average user rating; null when unrated

Schedule.description: Recurring air slot: time of day plus weekdays

Character.description: A fictional character portrayed by a person

PersonBase.description: A person record as it appears nested inside other resources.

Person.description: A person (actor, crew member, etc.), with optionally embedded credits.

LinkObject.description: HAL link: an href to a related resource (draft-kelly-json-hal-08)

NamedLink.description: HAL link with a human-readable name for the target resource

AlternateListLinks.description: HAL _links for an alternate list: self

AlternateEpisodeLinks.description: HAL _links for an alternate episode. episodes is an array: one alternate entry can map to multiple canonical episodes.

CastCreditLinks.description: HAL _links for a cast credit: show + character, both name+href links without images -- see CastCredit

GuestCastCreditLinks.description: HAL _links for a guest cast credit: episode + character -- a different link vocabulary than CastCreditLinks

CrewCreditLinks.description: HAL _links for a crew credit: show

ShowLinks.description: HAL _links for a show: self plus previousepisode/nextepisode when such episodes exist

ShowEmbedded.description: Related resources embedded in a Show. nextepisode/previousepisode appear only when such an episode exists.

ShowBase.description: A TV show record as it appears nested inside other resources; nested records carry no embedded relations.

example.name: Firefly
example.summary: Five hundred years in the future, a renegade crew aboard a small spacecraft tries to survive as they travel the unknown parts of the galaxy and evade warring factions as well as authority agents out to get them.

dvdCountry.description: Country of the DVD release ordering for this nested show record; null for most shows

Show.description: A TV show, with optionally embedded related resources.

example.name: Firefly
example.summary: Five hundred years in the future, a renegade crew aboard a small spacecraft tries to survive as they travel the unknown parts of the galaxy and evade warring factions as well as authority agents out to get them.

dvdCountry.description: Country of the show's DVD release ordering; null for most shows

EpisodeEmbedded.description: Related resources embedded in an Episode.

EpisodeLinks.description: HAL _links for an episode: self plus the owning show

EpisodeBase.description: A single TV episode record as it appears nested inside other resources.

example.name: The Train Job
example.summary: After finding themselves in a fight with supporters of The Alliance in a place that fairly resembles a bar, Mal, Zoe and Jayne walk away with knowledge that a man named Niska might have a new job for them.

number.description: Episode number within its season; null when the nested record is a special

airdate.description: Air date of the nested episode record (YYYY-MM-DD); empty string when not yet announced

airstamp.description: Air timestamp of the nested episode record; null when the air date is not yet announced

Episode.description: A single TV episode, with optionally embedded related resources. Has no flat `show` property; the flat show on /schedule responses belongs to ScheduleEntry.

example.name: The Train Job
example.summary: After finding themselves in a fight with supporters of The Alliance in a place that fairly resembles a bar, Mal, Zoe and Jayne walk away with knowledge that a man named Niska might have a new job for them.

airdate.description: Air date (YYYY-MM-DD); empty string when the air date is not yet announced

airstamp.description: Air timestamp; null when the air date is not yet announced

SeasonEmbedded.description: Related resources embedded in a Season.

SeasonBase.description: A season record as it appears nested inside other resources.

name.description: Optional name of the nested season record; usually an empty string

Season.description: A season of a TV show, with optionally embedded related resources.

name.description: Optional season name; usually an empty string

CastMember.description: A person-character pairing in a show's cast

CrewMember.description: A person in a show's crew

type.description: Crew role (e.g. Creator, Director, Writer, Executive Producer)

GuestCrewMember.description: A person in an episode's guest crew. Carries guestCrewType (not type) and the person inline, with no _links -- structurally distinct from show-level CrewMember.

guestCrewType.description: Guest crew role. Known values: Writer, Director, Story, Teleplay; not confirmed exhaustive.

CastCreditEmbedded.description: Related resources embedded in a CastCredit.

CastCreditBase.description: An acting credit record as it appears nested inside other resources.

CastCredit.description: A person's acting credit, linking to show and character (person-credits-cast). character in _links is a name+href link without an image -- unlike show-level CastMember, which embeds the full Character; person-character-details (/characters/{id}) is the route to the character's image.

GuestCastCreditEmbedded.description: Related resources embedded in a GuestCastCredit.

GuestCastCreditBase.description: A guest-acting credit record as it appears nested inside other resources.

GuestCastCredit.description: A person's guest-acting credit, linking to episode and character (person-credits-guestcast) -- a different link vocabulary than CastCredit. Same image asymmetry as CastCredit: character is a name+href link without an image; person-character-details is the route to the full record.

CrewCreditEmbedded.description: Related resources embedded in a CrewCredit.

CrewCreditBase.description: A crew credit record as it appears nested inside other resources.

type.description: Crew role for the nested credit record

CrewCredit.description: A person's crew credit, linking to show (person-credits-crew).

PersonEmbedded.description: Related resources embedded in a Person.

Aka.description: An alternate name (title) for a show

country.description: Country of the alternate title; null indicates an AKA in the show's original country

AlternateListEmbedded.description: Related resources embedded in an AlternateList.

AlternateListBase.description: An alternate episode ordering list record as it appears nested inside other resources.

language.description: Language of a nested language-premiere list record; usually null

webChannel.description: Web channel a nested premiere list record is scoped to; usually null

AlternateList.description: An alternate episode ordering list for a show -- functionally equivalent to TMDB Episode Groups and TVDB season types. Six boolean flags identify the list type (DVD order, verbatim order, premiere variants).

language.description: Language of a language-premiere list; usually null

webChannel.description: Web channel a premiere list is scoped to; usually null

AlternateEpisodeEmbedded.description: Related resources embedded in an AlternateEpisode.

episodes.description: The canonical episodes this alternate entry maps to; can be more than one

AlternateEpisodeBase.description: An alternate episode entry record as it appears nested inside other resources.

airdate.description: Air date of the nested alternate entry; empty string when not applicable or unknown

AlternateEpisode.description: An episode entry within an alternate list (EpisodeGroup), carrying the alternate ordering's numbering and linking to the canonical episode(s) it maps to. Has no url or self link of its own.

airdate.description: Air date; empty string when not applicable or unknown

ShowSearchResult.description: A show search result with relevance score

PersonSearchResult.description: A person search result with relevance score

ScheduleEntry.description: A scheduled episode with a flat show property; returned by /schedule only. /schedule/web and /schedule/full return plain Episode with an always-populated _embedded.show instead.

UpdatesMap.description: Map of entity ID (as string key) to Unix timestamp of last update

ErrorCause.description: Nested cause inside an Error envelope, present on invalid-route 404s only

ShowEmbedRelation.description: Valid embed[] relations for a show. nextepisode/previousepisode return results only when such an episode exists.

EpisodeEmbedRelation.description: Valid embed[] relations for an episode.

SeasonEmbedRelation.description: Valid embed[] relations for a season.

PersonEmbedRelation.description: Valid embed[] relations for a person.

CastCreditEmbedRelation.description: Valid embed[] relations for a cast credit.

GuestCastCreditEmbedRelation.description: Valid embed[] relations for a guest cast credit.

CrewCreditEmbedRelation.description: Valid embed[] relations for a crew credit.

AlternateListEmbedRelation.description: Valid embed[] relations for an alternate list.

AlternateEpisodeEmbedRelation.description: Valid embed[] relations for an alternate episode.

tags.name: Shows
tags.description: Show, cast, crew, and episode-index data

tags.name: Episodes
tags.description: Individual episode data and guest credits

tags.name: EpisodeGroups
tags.description: Alternate episode orderings (TVmaze wire term: alternate lists) -- functionally equivalent to TMDB Episode Groups and TVDB season types. Wire paths and schema names stay vendor-true (AlternateList, AlternateEpisode).

tags.name: Updates
tags.description: Change tracking for shows and people
